memoryArtifacts.headline: Ambrose Fowler and Jane Alvord History follows:
memoryArtifacts.description:
AMBROSE FOWLER was born about 1618, of Dalbury, Lees, Derbyshire, England, to William Fowler (1572-1660) and Sarah Neeld (1599-1638.) He married Jane Alvord, 26 May 1646, in Windsor, Massachusetts.

A …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Alford於1622年12月8日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓時，她的父親Thomas Alford47歲，母親Frances Joan Hawkins28歲。她於1646年5月6日與Ambrose Fowler Sr.在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Alford于1622年12月8日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓时，她的父亲Thomas Alford47岁，母亲Frances Joan Hawkins28岁。她于1646年5月6日与Ambrose Fowler Sr.在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Alford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Alford, for example in Somerset, Cheshire and Lincolnshire. The first is named with the Old English female personal name Ealdgȳth + ford ‘ford’. See also Alvord .

variants.name: Alvord
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of   Alford   1; the spelling reflects the southwestern English dialect pronunciation.
History: This surname was brought to North America by Alexander Alvord, who came from Devon or Somerset to Windsor, CT, c. 1645. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Halford
meanings: English (mainly Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Halford. Most, for example those in Warwickshire, Devon, and Shropshire, or the lost place Haleford in Pembury (Kent), are named from Old English halh ‘nook, recess’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: variant of Alford with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Alford was born on 8 December 1622, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Alford, was 47 and her mother, Frances Joan Hawkins, was 28. She married Ambrose Fowler Sr. on 6 May 1646, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 May 1684, in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Alford est née le 8 décembre 1622, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Alford, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Frances Joan Hawkins, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Ambrose Fowler Sr. le 6 mai 1646, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1684, à Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Alford am 8. Dezember 1622 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Alford 47 und ihre Mutter Frances Joan Hawkins 28. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1646 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England Ambrose Fowler Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1684 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Alford è nata il il 8 dicembre 1622 nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Alford, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Frances Joan Hawkins, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Ambrose Fowler Sr. il 6 maggio 1646, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1684, nel Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Alfordが1622年12月8日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Alfordは47歳，母Frances Joan Hawkinsは28歳であった。1646年5月6日にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンでAmbrose Fowler Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年5月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアウエストフィールドで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアウエストフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Alford(이)가 1622년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Alford(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Joan Hawkins(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1646년 5월 6일 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 Ambrose Fowler Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 웨스트필드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 웨스트필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Alford nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1622, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Alford, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Frances Joan Hawkins, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Ambrose Fowler Sr. em 6 de maio de 1646, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1684, em Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Alford родилась 8 декабря 1622 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Alford было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Joan Hawkins, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ambrose Fowler Sr. 6 мая 1646 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 мая 1684 г. в местности вестфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вестфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Alford nació el 8 de diciembre de 1622, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Alford, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Frances Joan Hawkins, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ambrose Fowler Sr. el 6 de mayo de 1646, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1684, en Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
